name: polly
description: Shared, canonical-repository memory for developer-owned Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Share trusted coding context across forks.
interface.longDescription: Polly stays inactive until a repository is initialized, then retrieves scoped project memory, records authenticated rolling shared checkpoints, and saves explicit private continuity notes without blocking Codex when Polly is unavailable.
defaultPrompt: Set up Polly for this device.
Pause Polly memory writes for this repository.
Remember this note privately across my future sessions.
Share this decision with my collaborators.
